subcategory: glass-morphism account settings with subscription management
use_cases: SaaS subscription management dashboard with billing controls
User account settings page with notification preferences
Premium app settings card with glass morphism aesthetic
ai_summary: A glass morphism-styled account settings card featuring subscription management with plan features, notification toggles, and smooth entrance animations using Framer Motion. The component showcases backdrop blur effects, semi-transparent backgrounds, and hover state transitions for a premium SaaS aesthetic. Includes accessibility support via useReducedMotion hook for users who prefer reduced animations.
